categories.domain_generic: New Asset-domain code; use Asset terminology.
categories.skill_adapter_specific: Skill parsing or payload semantics; retain Skill terminology.
categories.legacy_compatibility: Existing public API, persisted field, or Runtime/governance contract; retain until an approved migration.
categories.historical_migration: Historical schema, event, or migration identifier; never rename in place.
categories.fixture: Compatibility or regression fixture; change only with its governing contract.
categories.documentation_only: Explanatory text; update deliberately without implying a code migration.

path_rules.exception: Symbols containing skill are Skill adapter-specific.

p1_evidence_gate: Rename only after a versioned migration, usage evidence, rollback rehearsal, and explicit approval.
